reply: 低缓存价会改变用法：以前怕烧钱不敢让模型多试，现在可以把探索、改错、验证都放进自动循环里。
page_title: X 上的 思维怪怪：“开发者正在利用 DeepSeek V4 API 极低的缓存命中价格进行大规模全自动编程，其单日处理数百亿 Token 的成本远低于同类模型。 尽管 DeepSeek 并未像同行那样推出包月代码套餐（Coding Plan），但开发者仍评价其真正让普通人实现了 Token 自由，堪称大模型领域的「价格屠夫」。 多位开发者在 X https://t.co/3fswOt6x6a” / X

reply: The 22,000 hours part is the signal. A personal AI OS only works if it carries taste, history, and recovery across many tiny sessions.
page_title: (1) X 上的 Ronin：“🚨 SOMEONE JUST KILLED THE COACHING INDUSTRY a developer spent 22,000 hours building a Personal AI Operating System on top of Claude Code now anyone with a terminal can install it for FREE it knows your goals, remembers every decision you've made, and prepares your morning https://t.co/ciTQmGifhr” / X
